items.title: 14 year old kid goes on joyride in stolen buss for 3rd time in 6 months

items.title: Large-scale Ukrainian drone attack kills three in Moscow region, says Russia
items.dek: In Ukraine, local officials report eight injured in overnight Russian drone strikes and shelling.
items.body: In Ukraine, local officials report eight injured in overnight Russian drone strikes and shelling.

items.title: WHO declares Ebola outbreak in DR Congo a global health emergency
items.dek: The agency added that the outbreak, with around 246 cases and 80 deaths, does not meet the criteria of pandemic emergency.
items.body: The agency added that the outbreak, with around 246 cases and 80 deaths, does not meet the criteria of pandemic emergency.
